# zig-ctap2

> Portable CTAP2/FIDO2 USB HID library in Zig with C FFI -- direct communication with security keys (YubiKey, SoloKeys), no Apple entitlements needed.

## API

16 exported C functions. All blocking with timeouts, all thread-safe. Header: `include/ctap2.h`.

### Device Enumeration

- `int ctap2_device_count(void)` -- Get number of connected FIDO2 devices.

### Raw Response Functions

- `int ctap2_make_credential(...)` -- Register a credential (raw CBOR response).
- `int ctap2_get_assertion(...)` -- Authenticate (raw CBOR response).
- `int ctap2_get_info(result_buf, result_buf_len)` -- Get device capabilities.

### Parsed Response Functions

- `int ctap2_make_credential_parsed(...)` -- Register + parse to credential_id, attestation_object.
- `int ctap2_get_assertion_parsed(...)` -- Authenticate + parse to credential_id, auth_data, signature, user_handle.

### Pure Parsing (no I/O)

- `int ctap2_parse_make_credential_response(...)` -- Parse raw MakeCredential response.
- `int ctap2_parse_get_assertion_response(...)` -- Parse raw GetAssertion response.

### PIN Protocol

- `int ctap2_get_pin_retries(int *out_retries)` -- Get remaining PIN retries.
- `int ctap2_get_pin_token(pin, out_pin_token, out_pin_token_len)` -- Full ECDH handshake for PIN token.
- `int ctap2_make_credential_with_pin(...)` -- PIN-authenticated registration.
- `int ctap2_get_assertion_with_pin(...)` -- PIN-authenticated assertion.

### Keepalive Callback Variants

- `int ctap2_make_credential_with_keepalive(...)` -- Registration with keepalive callback.
- `int ctap2_get_assertion_with_keepalive(...)` -- Assertion with keepalive callback.

### Utilities

- `const char *ctap2_status_message(uint8_t status)` -- Human-readable error message.
- `int ctap2_debug_last_ioreturn(void)` -- Last IOKit return code (debug).

## Error Codes

- `0` = CTAP2_OK (success)
- `-1` through `-10` = library errors (NO_DEVICE, TIMEOUT, PROTOCOL, BUFFER_TOO_SMALL, OPEN_FAILED, WRITE_FAILED, READ_FAILED, CBOR, DEVICE, PIN)
- Positive values = CTAP2 device status byte (e.g. 0x27 = user denied, 0x31 = wrong PIN)

## Integration

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-ctap2.git vendor/ctap2
cd vendor/ctap2 && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
```

Link: `-lctap2 -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation` (macOS).
Include: `#include "ctap2.h"`.
macOS entitlement: `com.apple.security.device.usb`.

## Source Files

- `src/ffi.zig` -- C FFI exports (16 functions)
- `src/ctap2.zig` -- CTAP2 command encoding and CBOR response parsing
- `src/pin.zig` -- PIN protocol v2 (ECDH P-256, AES-256-CBC, HMAC-SHA-256)
- `src/cbor.zig` -- Minimal CBOR encoder/decoder for CTAP2 subset
- `src/ctaphid.zig` -- CTAPHID 64-byte packet framing
- `src/hid.zig` -- Platform HID transport selector
- `src/hid_macos.zig` -- macOS IOKit HID transport
- `src/hid_linux.zig` -- Linux hidraw transport
- `include/ctap2.h` -- C header
